message:
Rename package from tenzir-changelog to tenzir-ship

- Rename source directory: src/tenzir_changelog → src/tenzir_ship
- Update package name and entry point in pyproject.toml
- Update repository URLs to tenzir/ship
- Update all imports across source and test files
- Update CLI name references in help text and error messages
- Update GitHub workflow files
- Update changelog/config.yaml project metadata

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@ Load the `python:following-conventions` skill when working with code, tooling, o
 
 ## CLI
 
-`src/tenzir_changelog/` contains the Click-based CLI:
+`src/tenzir_ship/` contains the Click-based CLI:
 
 - `cli.py`: command registration and entry points
 - `config.py`: project configuration handling

@@ -29,4 +29,4 @@ jobs:
         run: uv sync --python 3.12 --dev
 
       - name: Validate changelog workspace
-        run: uv run tenzir-changelog --root changelog validate
+        run: uv run tenzir-ship --root changelog validate

@@ -105,4 +105,4 @@ jobs:
         uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
 
       - name: Smoke test wheel
-        run: uvx --from dist/*.whl tenzir-changelog --help
+        run: uvx --from dist/*.whl tenzir-ship --help

@@ -1,9 +1,9 @@
-id: changelog
-name: Tenzir Changelog
+id: ship
+name: Tenzir Ship
 description: >-
   A changelog management framework that curates entries, ships release notes,
   and assembles public changelogs.
-repository: tenzir/changelog
+repository: tenzir/ship
 components:
-  cli: The command-line interface accessible via `tenzir-changelog`.
+  cli: The command-line interface accessible via `tenzir-ship`.
   python: User-facing Python API (not the project-internal Python code).

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 [project]
-name = "tenzir-changelog"
+name = "tenzir-ship"
 version = "0.19.1"
 description = "Reusable changelog management toolkit for Tenzir repositories."
 readme = "README.md"

-"Bug Tracker" = "https://github.com/tenzir/changelog/issues"
-Documentation = "https://docs.tenzir.com"
+Homepage = "https://github.com/tenzir/ship"
+Repository = "https://github.com/tenzir/ship"
+"Bug Tracker" = "https://github.com/tenzir/ship/issues"
+Documentation = "https://docs.tenzir.com/reference/ship-framework"
 
 [project.scripts]
-tenzir-changelog = "tenzir_changelog.cli:main"
+tenzir-ship = "tenzir_ship.cli:main"
 
 [build-system]
 requires = ["hatchling>=1.25.0"]
@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@ build-backend = "hatchling.build"

 [tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel]
-packages = ["src/tenzir_changelog"]

@@ -106,7 +106,7 @@ warn_unreachable = true

-source = ["src/tenzir_changelog"]
+source = ["src/tenzir_ship"]
 branch = true
 omit = [
   "*/tests/*",
